name: Stuffing for Flounder
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all ingredients.
2. Saute mushrooms and onions for 5 minutes in butter.
3. Stir in bread crumbs and crab meat. Cook for 2 minutes.
4. Add salt, pepper, lemon juice, and ketchup.
5. Pour mixture into cream (divide into two equal parts).
6. Stuff the flounder with the mixture.
7. Bake at 425°F for 10-15 minutes.
8. Pat a pat of butter on top and serve with mornay sauce.
